payload.description:
## Summary
Add a gold-standard curation workflow that determines which feedback-backed labels are eligible for deterministic reference dataset builds.

## Deliverables
- Prefer a dedicated review/curation model if schema budget allows after cleanup.
- If schema budget is constrained, this issue still owns the final storage-design decision rather than weakening the requirement informally.
- Define the workflow output that marks labels/items as eligible for reference dataset inclusion.

## Dependency note
Depends on the schema-budget audit to confirm the preferred implementation path.
payload.title: Add gold-standard curation workflow for feedback-backed labels
